name: CHEXUSCellCapability
title: Cloud Healthcare Exchange — US cell (PoC)
description: Honesty CapabilityStatement for the CHEX US jurisdiction cell. Declares FHIR R4 + US Core 6.1.0 intent and the limited PoC resource set. Not ONC-certified health IT, not a TEFCA QHIN Participant, and not a claim of full USCDI v3 or US Core coverage.

software.name: Cloud Healthcare Exchange gateway + HAPI US

implementation.description: US jurisdiction cell — Facilitated FHIR pattern (SOP 2.0 floor). Gateway metadata at /v1/fhir/metadata; clinical data via HAPI.

rest.documentation: PoC subset only. USCDI v3 floor; samples implement Patient (US Core Patient). Consent/Observation/Provenance are phased or partial.

service.text: SSRAA/UDAP stub (shared-secret bearer) — not production SSRAA

security.description: US-home reads require Authorization: Bearer <client>.<secret> per ADR 0009. TEFCA XP via X-TEFCA-XP (T-TREAT, T-IAS, T-HCO).

resource.documentation: USCDI v3 demographics subset for PoC samples only.
Consent state primarily via consent-service + OPAL; FHIR Consent resource support is partial/phased.
Optional PoC; not fully populated in samples.
